description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with five stories, featuring a flat, overhanging roof and a dark facade. The front and left sides are heavily covered in green ivy, giving the building a weathered, natural appearance. The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with arched tops on the upper floors and rectangular shapes on the lower levels. The ground floor has a single main entrance door, and the building lacks balconies or exterior ornamentation. The right and rear sides are plain, with only windows and no visible vegetation. The overall style is utilitarian, with a touch of historic charm due to the arched windows and ivy growth.
description: A five-story apartment building with a flat roof, dark facade, and extensive ivy covering the front and left sides. Symmetrical arched and rectangular windows add a historic touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and dense ivy covering much of the facade.
description_view_1: Left side view dominated by thick ivy growth, with windows partially obscured by vegetation.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain walls, multiple windows, and no ivy or entrance visible.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clean facade, regularly spaced windows, and minimal vegetation.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in evenly spaced vertical columns, with each floor having a consistent pattern. Arched windows are present on the upper floors, while rectangular windows are on the lower levels, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
